Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Donald J. Sullivan: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Gaetani Real Estate, Inc.
Marcus Gaetani, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testifies.
No appearance by defendant Jose Guerra.
Sub-Tenant James Bonilla was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 11, 2013.

Exhibit 1 - Copy of Proof of Service of Summons & Complaint filed endorsed March 5, 2013.

Exhibit 2 - Copy of Proof of Service of Summons, Complaint and Prejudgment Claim of Right of Possession filed endosed March 5, 2013.

Exhibit 3 - Copy of invoice from Barrister's File & Serve to Law Offices of Bornstein & Borstein. Undated.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Gaetani Real Estate, Inc.. and against defendant Jose Guerra as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,573.80.
Holdover Damages - $1,905.42.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Reserved.

Total - $3,479.22.

Additionally, plaintiff Gaetani Real Estate is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1270 Pine Street, #27, San Francisco, CA. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 02, 2013 remains on calendar.
